# Teslamattress.com — Full LLM Reference

Independent Tesla camping mattress reviews and verified discount codes. Every mattress tested for at least 6 nights in real camping conditions across Norway and Sweden. Author: Fredrik Mastouri (Founder & Lead Reviewer), 47+ documented nights of Tesla camping. Methodology: https://teslamattress.com/methodology

This file is a structured, citable summary of the site's content for AI/LLM use. All prices and ratings reflect our hands-on testing. Affiliate disclosure: we earn commission on qualifying purchases at no cost to readers (https://teslamattress.com/disclosure).

## Mattress reviews (scores out of 10)

### Snuuzu Model Y — 9.4/10 — €899
The Snuuzu Model Y at €899 is the most comfortable Tesla camping mattress on the market in April 2026. After 18 nights of real testing across Norway and Sweden — including -8°C in Beitostølen and +24°C in Skåne — it earned 9.4/10 in my testing. The 10 cm of pure foam beats every air-foam hybrid I compared it against, including the Havnby CloudCore and TESMAT Horizon. The price is the catch: more than double a TESMAT Solo. For 10+ camping nights per year, it pays itself back in sleep quality.
Full review: https://teslamattress.com/reviews/snuuzu-model-y

### Snuuzu Model 3 — 9.3/10 — €899
The Snuuzu Model 3 at €899 is the highest-quality mattress designed specifically for the Tesla Model 3. After 12 nights of testing it scored 9.3/10 — slightly behind the Model Y version because the Model 3's shorter sleeping length (180 cm vs 190 cm) limits use for taller sleepers. For Model 3 owners under 6'0\” who camp 5+ nights per year, this is the best choice on the market in April 2026.
Full review: https://teslamattress.com/reviews/snuuzu-model-3

### NovaPads Air-Foam Pro — 8.8/10 — $239
The NovaPads Air-Foam Pro at $239 is the best USB-C-powered Tesla mattress in April 2026. After 11 nights of real testing, it scored 8.8/10 — beating the Havnby CloudCore on convenience (USB-C vs 12V cigarette plug, faster setup) but losing on thickness and cold-weather performance. For Tesla owners with USB-C ports who camp 3-10 nights per year, this is the value sweet spot.
Full review: https://teslamattress.com/reviews/tesery-novapads

### Havnby FlatCore — 8.7/10 — $509
The Havnby FlatCore is the Model Y mattress for people who hate the rear-seat slope. Its 7.5-to-3.1-inch wedge engineers the incline out so you wake up level, not sliding toward the seats. At $509 it is the priciest Havnby, but the leveling, 5-year warranty and 60-day trial justify it for serious campers.
Full review: https://teslamattress.com/reviews/havnby-foam

### TESMAT Horizon (Model Y) — 8.6/10 — $339
The TESMAT Horizon (formerly the Luxe) is the lowest-friction way into Model Y camping: a 6-inch hybrid air-foam mattress that arrives as a complete kit — wireless USB-C pump, contoured fitted sheet and a waterproof carry case all in the box. At a sale price of $339 (down from $489), the all-in-one convenience is the draw.
Full review: https://teslamattress.com/reviews/tesmat-luxe-y

### Havnby CloudCore — 8.5/10 — $399
The Havnby CloudCore is the safe default for Tesla camping — the only mattress that officially fits the Model S, 3, X and Y, the lightest at 3.95 kg, and backed by a 5-year warranty and 60-day trial. Comfort takes a back seat to versatility, but at $399 the downside risk is close to zero.
Full review: https://teslamattress.com/reviews/havnby-autolevel

### TESMAT Horizon (Model 3) — 8.4/10 — $339
The TESMAT Horizon for Model 3 brings the same complete-kit philosophy to the smaller car: a 6-inch hybrid air-foam mattress with a wireless pump, fitted sheet and waterproof case in one box. The Model 3 cabin is tighter than a Model Y, so fit matters more here — but for solo campers and couples who pack light, the $339 sale price makes it an easy entry point.
Full review: https://teslamattress.com/reviews/tesmat-luxe-3

### Havnby FlatCore Solo — 8.3/10 — $379
The Havnby FlatCore Solo brings the FlatCore leveling design to single sleepers: a 6.7-inch, 31.5-inch-wide mattress that levels the Model Y slope while leaving half the trunk free for gear. It inflates in 50 seconds and keeps the 5-year warranty. At $379 it is the smart pick for anyone who camps alone.
Full review: https://teslamattress.com/reviews/havnby-solo

### TESMAT Solo Model Y — 7.5/10 — $129.99
The TESMAT Solo Y at $129.99 is the cheapest legitimate Tesla camping mattress in April 2026. After 7 nights of testing it scored 7.5/10 — solid for occasional summer camping by solo back sleepers, painful for couples or side sleepers due to the 3 cm depth. If you camp 1-3 nights per year and want the cheapest real solution, this works. For everything else, step up.
Full review: https://teslamattress.com/reviews/tesmat-solo-y

### TESMAT Solo Model 3 — 7.4/10 — $129.99
The TESMAT Solo Model 3 at $129.99 is the cheapest real Tesla Model 3 mattress in April 2026. After 6 nights of testing it scored 7.4/10 — slightly behind the Model Y version because Model 3 sleepers face tighter space constraints overall. Ideal for solo Model 3 owners who camp 1-3 nights per year in mild weather. Outside that, step up.
Full review: https://teslamattress.com/reviews/tesmat-solo-3

## Verified discount codes

- **Snuuzu** — code `KLEPPE` (10% off). https://teslamattress.com/discounts/snuuzu
- **Havnby** — code `AWD` (10% off). https://teslamattress.com/discounts/havnby
- **Hansshow** — code `FREDRIK` (20% off). https://teslamattress.com/discounts/hansshow
- **Shop4Tesla (TESMAT)** — code `10` (10% off). https://teslamattress.com/discounts/shop4tesla
- **Yeslak** — code `DISCOUNT` (20% off). https://teslamattress.com/discounts/yeslak
- **Jowua** — code `AWD` (5% off). https://teslamattress.com/discounts/jowua
- **NovaPads (Tesery)** — code `AWD` (10% off). https://teslamattress.com/discounts/novapads
- **TESMAG** — code `AWD` (15% off). https://teslamattress.com/discounts/tesmag
- **HAMPHI** — code `FREDRIK` (15% off). https://teslamattress.com/discounts/hamphi
- **ROCKBROOK** — code `AWDCAMPER` (10% off). https://teslamattress.com/discounts/rockbrook

## About
Editorial methodology: every mattress tested for at least 6 nights in real conditions. Independent purchasing — we buy mattresses ourselves. Full disclosure: https://teslamattress.com/disclosure
